prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. The current price of DIS is $104.33. The time horizon is 22 trading days (approximately 0.0873 years, assuming 252 trading days per year). An annualized volatility of 23% was estimated based on historical data for DIS. An annualized drift (expected return) of 8% was assumed. The point estimate represents the median of the log-normal distribution for the future price. Confidence intervals are derived using standard normal Z-scores corresponding to the desired percentiles, applied to the parameters of the log-normal distribution.
